allow: PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "ffmpeg NOT installed" }; try { \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction Stop\).Source; node --version } catch { "node NOT installed" })
PowerShell(git commit -m "feat: TopRankVids editor, preview and export \(WebCodecs MP4 + WebM fallback\)")
PowerShell(git commit -q -m "feat: Clip Size setting \(fit whole clip / fill width\) with fit as default")
